comments.text: I would like to mention the recent preprint of Lee--Pohoata--Zhu, “The Minkowski grid has robustly many repeated distances”. It appears to settle the conjectural part of Problem #1207. The authors explicitly say in the abstract that their first result “confirms a conjecture of Erdős from 1980”, and after Corollary 3 they again write that “the first result confirms a conjecture by Erdős from 1980”.
